content: Config types use serde rename_all camelCase to match YAML field naming from TypeScript. All config structs implement Default with values matching DEFAULT_CONFIG. deep_merge via serde_yaml::Value; validate_config runs post-merge. serde_yaml used for parsing instead of a custom parser.

Rust config loader uses serde_yaml::Value for deep merge (not a custom parser). thiserror error structs use builder pattern: ConfigError::new().with_path().with_field(). resolve_project_root shells to git rev-parse --git-common-dir for worktree detection. Validation runs post-merge on fully materialized OverstoryConfig.
